source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 시험소/06. Usability 보완_250103/05. 주요 부품 인증서 + 사양서/60-2230C/KC_60-2230C/NK-23-E-0789(REP015256_Laird_ST60-2230C)_KC(적합인증변경).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: REP015256 is a Nemko Korea electromagnetic compatibility test report for Laird Technologies ST60-2230C specific low-power wireless equipment.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports Korean conformity assessment/KC evidence for electromagnetic compatibility of the tested wireless module sample.
keyPoints: The applicant and manufacturer are Laird Technologies, USA.
The equipment name/model is specific low-power wireless equipment for wireless access systems including WLAN, model ST60-2230C.
The overall test result is marked 적합.
Testing was performed from 2023년 08월 17일 to 2023년 08월 18일 and the report was issued on 2023년 09월 04일.
The report lists ST60-2230C-P as a derivative model with a component change from SDIO bus to PCIE bus.

evidence.evidenceText: 본 시험성적서의 시험결과는 신청인이 제출한 시료에 한합니다.

reviewFlags.reason: The source path indicates KC 적합인증변경, but the extracted source text is an EMC test report and does not provide a separate certification-change document title or approval decision.
Authority is partly inferred from cited Korean notices and conformity assessment context; the report itself is issued by ㈜넴코코리아, not directly by 국립전파연구원.
NKQF-27-15 (Rev. 9) appears to be the report form revision, while the report issue history states REP015256 최초 발급.
